title: Add a dark mode toggle to dashboard settings
body:
### Is your feature request related to a problem?

The dashboard is very bright by default, which is uncomfortable to use at night.

### Describe the solution you'd like

Add a dark mode toggle under Settings > Appearance that persists per-user and follows `prefers-color-scheme` by default.

### Describe alternatives you've considered

Using a browser extension to force dark mode, but it breaks some of the chart colors.

### Additional context

Happy to help test once a first pass lands. Not urgent — nice-to-have for a future release.

This is a fixture for Arena's github-maintainer-dungeon scenario (issue-triage happy-path trial). It is entirely synthetic test data — no real project, user, or issue.
